question: As of FY2023Q1, why did Pepsico raise full year guidance for FY2023?
answer:
Based on the provided document chunks, PepsiCo raised its full-year guidance for FY2023 because of a strong start to the year.

“Given our strong start to the year, we now expect our full-year 2023 organic revenue to increase 8 percent (previously 6 percent) and core constant currency EPS to increase 9 percent (previously 8 percent)” [PAGE 1]. This updated guidance is reiterated, noting the company now expects 8 percent organic revenue growth and 9 percent core constant currency EPS growth [PAGE 3].
